meta.description: Combines auto-generated file inventory with human-curated descriptions

product_overview: A comprehensive web application designed to manage karate schools efficiently, offering family-oriented registration, class and program management, attendance tracking, payment processing, communication tools, marketing features, and robust administrative controls.
core_goals: Provide an intuitive family portal for student enrollment, profile management, payments, and communication.
Enable administrators to manage families, programs, payments, attendance, and discounts with ease and efficiency.
Deliver instructors dedicated tools for session management, attendance tracking, and student monitoring suited for tablet and desktop.
Ensure secure, PCI-compliant payment processing with integrated Stripe and Square providers plus tax and invoice management.
Support marketing needs with dynamic landing pages, SEO optimization, and custom URL building for programs.
Offer robust security through CSRF protection, strict Content Security Policy, and role-based access control.
Enable scalable real-time communication via messaging and push notifications.
Provide offline support and PWA capabilities for enhanced user experience across devices.
Integrate AI-powered database chat for efficient bulk data operations and queries.
user_flow_summary: User registration and login with role-based access directing to appropriate dashboards (Family, Instructor, Admin).
Families manage profiles, add guardians, enroll students in classes or events, sign waivers digitally, and make payments securely.
Event registration follows a three-step flow: student selection, waiver signing (if required), and final registration with payment.
Administrators create and manage families, programs, classes, events, discounts, and oversee payments and attendance.
Admins use AI database chat for natural language queries to perform bulk operations and gain insights from student and payment data.
Admins manage calendar events, monitor push notification diagnostics, and configure system settings through dedicated admin tools.
Admins track student belt progression by creating and managing belt awards linked to student profiles.
Instructors access their portal to view sessions, mark attendance using tablet-friendly interfaces, communicate with families, and track student eligibility and progress.
Users interact with messaging systems to communicate internally with administrators or instructors through threaded conversations.
Families browse and purchase items from the online store, manage orders, and receive notifications on purchases and events.
Notification subscriptions manage push notifications settings enabling real-time alerts for important updates.
Marketing teams or admins generate and customize landing pages and URLs for promotions with SEO support including sitemap generation.
System monitors actions with security controls enforcing CSRF protection, authentication tokens, and role permissions.
Payments are processed through integrated Stripe and Square systems with invoice tracking, eligibility checking, and tax calculations.
Pending payments are tracked and managed separately, allowing admins to monitor outstanding balances and payment due dates.
validation_criteria: Successful user authentication and role-based access control functioning as intended across user types (admin, instructor, family).
Login functionality works correctly with proper session management and token refresh handling.
End-to-end family management workflow from creation to enrollment and payment is seamless and error-free.
Guardian management allows adding, editing, and removing guardians with proper family associations.
Student profile management including belt progression tracking and belt award creation functions correctly.
Digital waiver signing and PDF generation are completed correctly with appropriate storage and retrieval.
Event registration flow (student selection → waiver signing → registration) works seamlessly with proper validation.
Payment processing works reliably with Stripe and Square, including webhook event handling and tax application.
Payment eligibility checking and paid-until date calculation function correctly based on business rules.
Pending payment tracking and management in admin portal displays accurate information.
Invoices are generated correctly with line items and payment histories tracked and displayed accurately.
Attendance tracking captures session attendance and late arrivals with correct reporting in instructor and admin portals.
Messaging system enables realtime two-way communications without loss or corruption of messages.
Event and calendar views accurately reflect scheduled programs, sessions, and registrations with correct filtering.
Admin calendar management allows creating and editing calendar events with proper date handling.
Discount codes and automatic discounts apply properly during enrollment and checkout processes.
Store functions support inventory tracking and order management including variant handling and ordering workflows.
Push notifications deliver timely updates respecting user subscriptions and preferences.
Push notification diagnostics tools provide accurate troubleshooting information for admins.
PWA features provide offline usage, service worker registration, and installation prompts as expected.
Security features including CSRF tokens, strict CSP policies with nonce, JWT authentication, and RLS policies are enforced.
AI database chat effectively processes natural language queries and returns accurate dataset manipulations and insights.
Database schema retrieval and caching for AI chat works efficiently without performance degradation.
SEO sitemap generation produces valid XML with accurate URLs and proper update frequencies.
Program introduction pages and onboarding flow guide new users through registration smoothly.
Belt award management allows admins to track and update student belt progression accurately.
User interface responds correctly to theme changes and displays modern accessible components consistently.
System logging and error monitoring with Sentry capture and alert on critical failures or unexpected behaviors.

features.name: Admin Tools & Utilities
features.description: Administrative utilities for calendar management, diagnostics, and system monitoring

features.name: AI Database Chat
features.description: Natural language database querying using Google Gemini API for bulk operations and administrative insights
capabilities: Parses PostgreSQL string-formatted arrays (e.g., '{value1,value2}').
Handles native PostgreSQL array types returned by database drivers.
Converts various PostgreSQL array representations into standard JavaScript string arrays.
Facilitates the AI's understanding and processing of PostgreSQL array data.

features.name: Attendance System
features.description: Attendance tracking, recording, and reporting for students and sessions
capabilities: Enables family members to view general and specific student attendance history.
Empowers administrators to record, filter, and manage all student attendance entries.
Presents attendance data in structured tables with status badges and formatted dates.
Implements role-based access for family users and administrative staff.

features.name: Authentication & User Management
features.description: User authentication system with role-based access control (admin, instructor, family)
capabilities: Manages user login and session creation using Supabase.
Handles user logout and session termination securely.
Processes Supabase authentication callbacks for email verification or password resets.
Utilizes CSRF protection for authentication forms.

features.name: Calendar & Scheduling
features.description: Event calendar with filtering, different views (grid/list), session scheduling, and admin calendar management
capabilities: Displays various event types (e.g., sessions, birthdays) with visual status indicators.
Provides interactive calendar navigation and access to detailed event information.
Supports customizable grid and list views for events, with user preference persistence.
Enables filtering of events, including by student, for personalized views.

features.name: Discount System
features.description: Discount templates, automatic discounts, and discount code management
capabilities: Create, edit, and delete automatic discount rules.
Define and utilize reusable discount templates.
Assign and manage the application of automatic discounts to members.
Securely manage all discount operations via an admin-only interface.

features.name: Enrollment Management
features.description: Student enrollment in programs and classes with payment tracking
capabilities: View and list all existing student enrollments
Create new enrollments by linking students to specific classes
Search and filter enrollment records based on various criteria
Display detailed information about each enrollment, including status
Perform administrative actions on enrollments, such as status updates or deletion

features.name: Event Management
features.description: Manages event creation, student registration, and payment processing for karate school events.
capabilities: Facilitates student and family registration for events.
Handles secure payment processing for event fees, including tax calculation.
Collects and manages participant details during event registration.
Ensures robust error handling for event-related user interfaces.

features.name: Event Management & Registration
features.description: Event creation, management, and registration system with waiver integration

features.name: Family Management
features.description: Family profile management including guardians, students, and account settings
capabilities: Access personalized family dashboards and student profiles.
Manage and process student enrollment and recurring payments.
View school calendars and event schedules.
Monitor and complete incomplete student registrations.
Secure navigation and user-specific content delivery.

features.name: Guardian Management
features.description: Guardian profile creation, editing, and management within families
capabilities: Add new guardian profiles with personal details.
View and update individual guardian records.
Associate guardians with specific student families.
Delete guardian profiles with confirmation.
Provide an administrative interface for managing family-guardian relationships.

features.name: Instructor Portal
features.description: Instructor-specific features including messaging and session management

features.name: Invoice Management
features.description: Invoice creation, templates, line items, payment tracking, and PDF generation
capabilities: Create, edit, and process invoices with detailed forms.
Select and link invoices to specific entities (students/customers).
Dynamically manage invoice line items, including adding, duplicating, and removing.
Apply and calculate taxes for individual line items based on type.
Utilize invoice templates for efficient invoice generation.

features.name: Messaging System
features.description: Two-way messaging between families and admin/instructors with conversation threads
capabilities: Display distinct conversation lists for administrators and general users.
Summarize conversations with subjects, participant names, and last message timestamps.
Indicate unread message counts for ongoing conversations.
Provide a text input for composing and sending new messages.
Ensure secure message submission using CSRF protection.

features.name: Monetary System
features.description: Type-safe money handling with dinero.js for precision calculations

features.name: Onboarding & Introduction Pages
features.description: Program introduction pages and new user onboarding flow

features.name: Payment Processing
features.description: Multi-provider payment processing with Stripe and Square integration, eligibility checking, and paid-until calculation
capabilities: Process payments for event registrations, accounting for fees and student counts.
Manage invoice payments, display comprehensive payment history, and track outstanding balances.
Support a variety of payment methods including cash, check, credit card, bank transfer, and mobile pay.
Perform financial calculations, apply taxes, and format monetary values consistently.
Record and display details of who processed each payment for auditing and reporting.

features.name: Program & Class Management
features.description: Martial arts program and class management with session tracking
capabilities: View and browse available karate programs and classes with schedule details.
Administrators can create, edit, and update detailed class information.
Manage the status (e.g., complete, cancel) of individual class sessions.
Secure administration access with authentication and CSRF protection for management tasks.

features.name: Push Notifications
features.description: Web push notification system with subscription management and message replies
capabilities: Allows users to subscribe and unsubscribe from push notifications.
Provides a user interface for managing notification settings.
Supports storing and managing Web Push API subscription data.
Processes quick replies sent by users from interactive push notifications.
Integrates with Supabase for user authentication and database operations.

features.name: PWA Support
features.description: Progressive Web App with service worker, offline support, and install prompts
capabilities: Allows users to install the application to their device's home screen for an app-like experience.
Provides offline access to cached data, such as family details and upcoming class schedules.
Displays a user-friendly prompt for PWA installation and manages its state.
Implements an offline error boundary to gracefully handle network disconnections and display cached content.
Shows the current PWA status, including online/offline state and installation status.

features.name: Security & CSP
features.description: Content Security Policy with nonce-based script execution and CSRF protection

features.name: SEO & Marketing Infrastructure
features.description: SEO optimization with sitemap generation, structured data, and marketing landing pages

features.name: Store & Products
features.description: E-commerce functionality for products, variants, inventory, and orders
capabilities: Users can view their personal order history and individual order details.
Administrators can view, filter, and navigate through a list of all store orders.
Administrators can access detailed information for specific orders, including the ability to update order status and add internal notes.
Leverages Supabase for authenticated and secure data retrieval, distinguishing between user and admin access.

features.name: Student Management
features.description: Student profile management, enrollment, belt progression tracking, belt award management, and attendance tracking
capabilities: Create and edit student profiles with personal details and attributes like T-shirt size.
Manage student payment eligibility, setup, and financial details related to enrollment.
Facilitate student registration and enrollment for specific school events.
Provides different management interfaces for administrators and family members.

features.name: Tax Management
features.description: Tax rate configuration and application to invoices

features.name: Theme & UI
features.description: Provides dynamic light/dark/system theme switching and a foundational set of reusable UI components.
capabilities: Manages dynamic light, dark, and system theme modes for the application.
Persists user theme preferences across sessions using local storage.
Offers a foundational set of accessible and reusable UI components like buttons, dropdowns, and accordions.
Utilizes React Context for centralized theme state management.

features.name: Theme & UI Components
features.description: Dark/light theme support with Shadcn/UI component library

features.name: Utilities & Helpers
features.description: Shared utilities for validation, formatting, and common operations

features.name: Waiver System
features.description: Digital waiver signing, PDF generation, storage, and student coverage tracking
capabilities: Facilitates waiver display and signing, often integrated with event registration flows.
Captures and stores digital signatures along with associated guardian and student information.
Generates high-quality PDF documents of signed waivers, incorporating signature images and content.
Provides secure access for families to download their specific signed waiver PDFs.
Utilizes server-side logic for authentication, data retrieval, and PDF storage/delivery.
